title: Connect Panel
description: Studio UI for **Connect Panel**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Remote Studio connection: API base URL and optional token (standalone web and desktop remote profile).
context: Studio UI for **Connect Panel**: user-visible layout and actions driven exclusively through `SpecdDataPort` hooks. Remote Studio connection: API base URL and optional token (standalone web and desktop remote profile).

rules.requirement: view is composed using shadcn primitives
rules: The Connect Panel MUST be composed using shadcn `Card`, `Input`, `Button`, and `Alert` components to ensure consistency with the Studio design system.

rules.requirement: connect panel collects API URL and optional token
rules: The form MUST require API base URL and MAY collect an optional bearer token. “Test connection” MUST call `GET /v1/project` or health before saving the profile.

rules.requirement: connect panel displays auth type from API only
rules: After a successful test, the UI MUST show `auth.type` from the API response and MUST NOT read `specd.yaml` in the browser renderer.

rules.requirement: embedded Studio skips connect panel gating
rules: When `SpecdApp` runs in embedded mode (`specd ui serve`), the connect panel MUST NOT block access to the IDE.

scenarios.requirement: view is composed using shadcn primitives
scenarios.name: Form built with shadcn primitives
then: it uses shadcn Input, Label, Button, and Card/Dialog primitives
AND standard focus and validation styles apply

scenarios.requirement: connect panel collects API URL and optional token
scenarios.name: Test connection calls GET /v1/project
when: user enters base URL and clicks Test connection
then: AND auth type is shown from response

scenarios.requirement: connect panel collects API URL and optional token
scenarios.name: Saved profile restores on reload
then: AND IDE can mount without re-entry

scenarios.requirement: connect panel collects API URL and optional token
scenarios.name: Invalid URL shows connection error

scenarios.requirement: connect panel displays auth type from API only
scenarios.name: Auth type shown from API response
then: AND specd.yaml is not read in renderer

scenarios.requirement: connect panel displays auth type from API only
scenarios.name: Secrets are not displayed
then: no tokens from server are shown
AND user token field remains local

scenarios.requirement: connect panel displays auth type from API only
scenarios.name: Mismatching auth type still allows connect
then: AND client omits Bearer for disabled

scenarios.requirement: embedded Studio skips connect panel gating
scenarios.name: Embedded mode opens IDE directly

scenarios.requirement: embedded Studio skips connect panel gating
scenarios.name: Embedded API calls use same-origin /v1
then: requests target /v1 on the served origin
AND no remote base URL is configured

scenarios.requirement: embedded Studio skips connect panel gating
scenarios.name: Connect panel is not mounted in embedded mode
then: AND user lands directly in the IDE layout
